channel.title: NPR Programs: Morning Edition
channel.description: Morning Edition takes listeners around the country and the world with multi-faceted stories and commentaries every weekday. Hosts Steve Inskeep, Leila Fadel, Michel Martin and A Martínez bring you the latest breaking news and features to prepare you for the day.
channel.copyright: Copyright 2024 NPR - For Personal Use Only

item.title: President Trump and Iranian officials have conflicting stories about ongoing talks
item.description: President Trump is ordering the U.S. military to hold off on striking Iranian power plants, citing "productive" talks with Iran, but Iranian officials deny there's any dialogue with the U.S.
item.content:encoded: President Trump is ordering the U.S. military to hold off on striking Iranian power plants, citing "productive" talks with Iran, but Iranian officials deny there's any dialogue with the U.S.
item.dc:creator: Daniel Estrin

item.title: Voice of America staffers sue, alleging Kari Lake put on propaganda
item.description: Voice of America staffers are suing Trump administration official Kari Lake, alleging she put pro-Trump propaganda on its airwaves. She has lost numerous rulings of late.
item.content:encoded:
Voice of America staffers are suing Trump administration official Kari Lake, alleging she put pro-Trump propaganda on its airwaves. She has lost numerous rulings of late.

(Image credit: Voice of America)
item.dc:creator: David Folkenflik

item.title: Pilot and copilot killed in collision between jet and fire truck at LaGuardia airport
item.description: A pilot and co-pilot were killed after a collision at New York's LaGuardia Airport. An Air Canada regional jet struck a fire truck on the runway after landing late Sunday night.
item.content:encoded: A pilot and co-pilot were killed after a collision at New York's LaGuardia Airport. An Air Canada regional jet struck a fire truck on the runway after landing late Sunday night.
item.dc:creator: Steve Kastenbaum

item.title: Congress faces a litany of issues as lawmakers return to session
item.description: Congress faces a series of thorny problems when they return to session this week, including the ongoing partial government shutdown that has disrupted travel at U.S. airports.
item.content:encoded: Congress faces a series of thorny problems when they return to session this week, including the ongoing partial government shutdown that has disrupted travel at U.S. airports.
item.dc:creator: Claudia Grisales

item.title: Sen. Alex Padilla talks about ICE deployment to airports and the SAVE Act
item.description: NPR's Michel Martin asks Democratic Sen. Alex Padilla of California about ICE officers deploying to airports and a Republican bill to overhaul federal elections.
item.content:encoded: NPR's Michel Martin asks Democratic Sen. Alex Padilla of California about ICE officers deploying to airports and a Republican bill to overhaul federal elections.
item.dc:creator: Michel Martin

item.title: Worried about a shaky stock market? This is what financial advisers suggest you do
item.description: Their answer depends on how soon you need to tap into your funds — and it might simply be "do nothing."
item.content:encoded:
Their answer depends on how soon you need to tap into your funds — and it might simply be "do nothing."

(Image credit: Michael M. Santiago)
item.dc:creator: Stephan Bisaha

item.title: What does a 'GLP-1 Friendly' diet look like? We asked nutritionists
item.description: Big food companies are starting to market to people on the powerful new obesity meds with labels that say "GLP-1 Friendly." Nutritionists help us decode that message.
item.content:encoded:
Big food companies are starting to market to people on the powerful new obesity meds with labels that say "GLP-1 Friendly." Nutritionists help us decode that message.

(Image credit: Beck Harlan for NPR)
item.dc:creator: Yuki Noguchi

item.title: Morning news brief
item.description: Trump says Iran has 48 hours to reopen Strait of Hormuz as Iran responds with its own threat, Congress faces a long list of issues as it returns to session, ICE to deploy to U.S. airports Monday.
item.content:encoded: Trump says Iran has 48 hours to reopen Strait of Hormuz as Iran responds with its own threat, Congress faces a long list of issues as it returns to session, ICE to deploy to U.S. airports Monday.
item.dc:creator: A Martínez

item.title: K-pop group BTS returns with new album, massive concert after hiatus
item.description: K-pop supergroup BTS is back with a new album after a long hiatus. The group's fans welcomed them back this weekend at a massive concert in Seoul, South Korea.
item.content:encoded: K-pop supergroup BTS is back with a new album after a long hiatus. The group's fans welcomed them back this weekend at a massive concert in Seoul, South Korea.
item.dc:creator: Anthony Kuhn

item.title: The war in Iran and its wide-ranging effects across the globe
item.description: The Iran war is having an impact around the globe, from oil prices to old alliances.
item.content:encoded: The Iran war is having an impact around the globe, from oil prices to old alliances.
item.dc:creator: Jackie Northam
